title: `SIGSEGV` in `CaseVisitor::isCaseTreeFast(AstCase*)`

Present in the current top-of-tree version as well as the released stable version:

`Verilator 5.004 2022-12-14 rev v5.004` in the latest `4.x` version this does not occur.

What OS and distribution are you using?

CentOS 7

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
Sure 👍
